text:
{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "powershell.exe launched by wscript.exe with a hidden window and an encoded command, which is a common technique for obfuscated malware execution.",
  "indicators": [
    "wscript.exe parent process",
    "powershell.exe -noP (NoProfile)",
    "powershell.exe -w 1 (WindowStyle Hidden)",
    "powershell.exe -enc (EncodedCommand)",
    "obfuscated command line"
  ]
}
